mapper.select: select * from hd_file where path = #{path} and username = #{username} and status = '1' order by type desc
select * from hd_file where id = #{id} and type = 'File'
select * from hd_file where id = #{id} and type = 'Folder'
select * from hd_file where filename = #{foldername} and type = 'Folder'
select * from hd_file where username = #{username} and path = #{path} and filename = #{filename} and fileformat = #{fileformat} and status = '1' and type = 'File'
select * from hd_file where username = #{username} and path = #{path} and filename = #{filename} and status = '1' and type = 'Folder'
select * from hd_file where username = #{username} and status = '1' and favor = '1' order by type desc
select * from hd_file where username = #{username} and status = '0' order by type desc
select * from hd_file where path like concat(#{path},'%') and username = #{username} and status = '1'

select * from hd_file where filename like concat('%',#{filename},'%') and username = #{username} and type = 'File' and status = '1' or fileformat like concat('%',#{filename},'%') and username = #{username} and type = 'File' and status = '1'

select * from hd_file where filename like concat('%',#{filename},'%') and username = #{username} and status = '0' or fileformat like concat('%',#{filename},'%') and username = #{username} and status = '0'
